LanguageData.GrandioseBestowingCeremony.stages.0.desc: The inauguration was like a taste of true grandeur, and a moment of participation in something greater.
LanguageData.HonorableBestowingCeremony.stages.0.desc: The inauguration brought a sense of dignity and honor to the participants.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.0.description: I had to preside in an awful presidential suite. It's like a deliberate insult from my inferiors.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.0.label: awful presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.1.description: I had to preside in a dull presidential suite. It clearly diminished my stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.1.label: dull presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.2.description: I had to preside in a mediocre presidential suite. It didn't express my stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.2.label: mediocre presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.6.description: I presided in a very impressive presidential suite. It expressed noticeable stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.6.label: very impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.7.description: I presided in an extremely impressive presidential suite. It effectively demonstrated my stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.7.label: extremely impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.8.description: I presided in an unbelievably impressive presidential suite. The commoners will be amazed at my highness.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.8.label: unbelievably impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.9.description: I presided in a heavenly presidential suite. It matched my grace and nobility.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.9.label: wondrously impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.TerribleBestowingCeremony.stages.0.descr: The inauguration somehow felt petty and self-indulgent at the same time.
LanguageData.TerribleBestowingCeremony.stages.0.label: terrible inauguration
LanguageData.UnimpressiveBestowingCeremony.stages.0.d: The inauguration felt mechanical and lifeless.
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.0.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.0.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.1.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.1.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.2.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.2.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.3.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.3.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.4.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.4.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.5.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.5.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.6.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.6.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.7.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.7.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.8.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.8.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.9.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.9.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.0.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.0.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.1.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.1.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.2.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.2.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.3.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.3.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.4.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.4.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.5.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.5.label: joined the Brotherhood

LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.6.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.7.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.7.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.8.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.8.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.9.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.9.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.0.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.1.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.2.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.3.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.4.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.5.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.6.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.7.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.8.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.9.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.0.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.1.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.2.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.3.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.4.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.5.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.

LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.7.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
